selections.name: Bomb Perignon
selections.reason: Comes from the elite Waller yard and showed significant improvement last start on a slow track. Drawn well to feature prominently.

selections.name: Play It Cool
selections.reason: Has proven ability on heavy tracks with a solid second at this course two starts back. Mixes form but capable on his day.

selections.name: Halloween Holly
selections.reason: Relished the wet conditions last start to grab third at Port Macquarie. The inside draw gives her an economical run.

selections.name: Uniquely Famous (FR)
selections.reason: Second run back for the Waller stable. Will strip fitter and the step up in distance looks ideal for improvement.

danger_horse.name: Colorado Tycoon
danger_horse.reason: Improved sharply to finish second on a rain-affected track last start. Must be respected if he handles the Heavy 10.

selections.name: Egyptian Lass
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start on a heavy track at Grafton. Clearly appreciates the wet conditions and is ready to break through.

selections.name: Commedia
selections.reason: Resuming but showed good form last preparation including a narrow defeat on soft going. Trial form suggests she is ready.

selections.name: Mariemac
selections.reason: Switched to the Dodson yard and drops in class from her initial runs. Wide draw is a slight concern but has class edge.

selections.name: Funky Cold Medina
selections.reason: Open to improvement after a fair debut at Scone. Will need to handle the heavy track but has upside.

danger_horse.name: In Bocca Al Lupe
danger_horse.reason: Resuming but ran a solid second on debut at this track in the wet. Capable of surprising fresh.

selections.name: Be More Pacific
selections.reason: Dual acceptor who has been knocking on the door with two strong placings on wet tracks recently. The one to beat.

selections.name: Dellucy
selections.reason: Veteran mare who ran a close second on a wet track two starts back. Rates highly on her best figures.

selections.name: Zavy's Sun
selections.reason: Resuming after a long spell but comes off a recent trial win. Looks forward enough to make an impression.

selections.name: Awarded Glory
selections.reason: First run for a new stable after shifting from WA. Betting market will be the best guide to his chances.

danger_horse.name: Predict The Future
danger_horse.reason: Third-up and gets the inside draw. Placed on a heavy track two starts back and can sneak into the finish.

selections.name: Master Artist
selections.reason: Impressive winner at this track and distance on heavy going last start. Drawn perfectly to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Seething Chuck
selections.reason: Veteran who ran a strong second on a wet track last start. Gets the inside draw and carries a light weight.

selections.name: Five Rings (NZ)
selections.reason: Dominant winner last start and has placed on soft/heavy going previously. A major threat if he handles the extreme conditions.

selections.name: Bow
selections.reason: Has ability on his day and wasn't far away on a heavy track two starts back. Can sneak into the frame.

selections.name: Wanjina Rose
selections.reason: Absolute mudlark who has won her last two starts at this track in heavy conditions. Hard to go past on current form.

selections.name: Jewels Statement
selections.reason: Loves getting her toe into the ground and ran a solid third on a heavy track last start. Drawn well to contend.

selections.name: Barcelona Express
selections.reason: Placed on a heavy track two starts back at this course. Has the right credentials to give this a shake.

selections.name: Lady Alabama
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up. Has shown ability in the past and could feature if she handles the heavy conditions.

danger_horse.name: Flying Shelly
danger_horse.reason: Resumes here and generally goes well fresh. Trialled nicely and has placed on soft going previously.

selections.name: Ottoman Empire (NZ)
selections.reason: Scored a dominant 4.5 length win on a heavy track last start. Looks well placed to go back-to-back in these conditions.

selections.name: Ms Hubble
selections.reason: Won her maiden on a heavy track and wasn't far away last start. Wide draw is a concern but has the wet track form.

selections.name: Venom Wolf
selections.reason: Ran second on a wet track here two starts back. Gets the inside barrier and should get an economical run.

selections.name: Beearetee
selections.reason: Ran second on a rain-affected track two starts back. Drawn well and can improve on his latest effort.

danger_horse.name: Gavin
danger_horse.reason: Placed on a wet track here last start. Consistent type who will be competitive despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Immortal Storm
selections.reason: Emergency who gains a start. Won on a heavy track here last start and looks a major contender with the light weight.

selections.name: Agent Max
selections.reason: Another emergency gaining a start. Finished a close second last time out and is drawn perfectly to feature.

selections.name: Lord Seymour
selections.reason: Won his maiden on a rain-affected track here last start. The extreme outside barrier is a massive hurdle to overcome.

selections.name: Their Finest Hour
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid trial win. Has shown ability in the past but will need luck from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Homeland
danger_horse.reason: Racing well recently with a placing on a wet track last start. Wide draw makes it tough but has claims.
